name: Game & Watch
description: Nintendo's LCD handheld game platform before the Game Boy, built around dedicated single-game devices and simple score-chasing play.

eras.title: Silver and Gold Era
eras.description: Earliest simple single-screen models that established the Game & Watch format.

eras.title: Wide Screen Era
eras.description: Larger-screen handhelds that broadened Nintendo's LCD game design.

eras.title: Multi Screen Era
eras.description: Dual-screen clamshell games, including Donkey Kong, that shaped Nintendo handheld design.
